_comment: Canonical OperatorDocument shape. VSOD is the authority — it creates, owns, and stores this document in SQLite. g8ee reads it via VSOD HTTP API and VSODB KV cache. g8eo is the source of runtime data (heartbeats, system_info) that VSOD merges into this document. A field mismatch between VSOD and g8ee breaks operator binding, context building, and AI execution.
_cache_aside: VSODB KV — keyed by g8e:doc:operators:{operator_id}. Cache-aside pattern. SQLite is source of truth.

operator_document._description: Full operator record as stored in VSOD SQLite and returned by GET /api/internal/operators/:operatorId/status and GET /api/operators/status.

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns this operator

organization_id.description: Organization ID (equals user_id in single-user orgs)

operator_session_id.description: Current active session identifier. Set when g8eo authenticates. Cleared on termination.

web_session_id.description: Browser session the operator is currently bound to. Set during bind. Cleared on unbind.

api_key.description: Platform API key used by this operator for VSOD authentication (hashed form for validation)

operator_api_key.description: Per-operator API key provisioned in the slot. Used by g8eo to authenticate to VSOD.

certificate._description: Per-operator mTLS certificate provisioned by VSOD.

status.description: Current operator lifecycle status. See status.json operator.status.

started_at.description: When the operator process first authenticated with VSOD

first_deployed.description: When this operator slot was first ever activated (persisted across resets)

last_heartbeat.description: Timestamp of the most recently received heartbeat

slot_metadata._description: Operator slot provisioning fields. Slots are pre-created by VSOD for each user.

slot_number.description: Slot index (1-based). Null for dynamically created operators.

is_slot.description: True when this document represents a pre-provisioned slot

claimed.description: True when the slot has been claimed by a running g8eo process

operator_type.description: Operator deployment type. See status.json operator.type.

cloud_subtype.description: Cloud provider. Only set when operator_type is cloud. See status.json cloud.subtype.

is_g8e_pod.description: True when this slot is the platform-managed g8ep operator (slot 1). Always pinned at the top of the operator list. Restart via POST /api/operators/g8ep/reauth.

slot_cost.description: Number of operator slots this instance consumes

consumed_by_operator_id.description: For slot documents: the operator_id of the g8eo process that claimed this slot

investigation_context._description: Active investigation/case context. Set when the operator is bound to an investigation session.

system_info._description: Operator host system information. Shape defined in wire/system_info.json. Populated from g8eo auth payload and updated on each heartbeat.

fingerprint._description: Top-level fingerprint columns denormalized from system_info for efficient SQLite queries.

system_fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the operator host. Copied from system_info.system_fingerprint.

fingerprint_details.description: Structured fingerprint sub-fields. Copied from system_info.fingerprint_details.

runtime_config.description: CLI flags and env var overrides active when the operator binary was started. Sent by g8eo at bootstrap and updated on reconnect. Shape mirrors models.RuntimeConfig in g8eo wire.go.

cloud_mode.description: True when operator started with --cloud flag

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider (aws, gcp, azure). Empty unless cloud_mode is true.

local_storage_enabled.description: True when local SQLite storage is enabled (--local-storage flag)

no_git.description: True when ledger is disabled (--no-git flag)

wss_port.description: WSS port dialled on VSODB for pub/sub

http_port.description: HTTPS port dialled on VSODB for auth/bootstrap

latest_heartbeat_snapshot.description: Most recent heartbeat performance snapshot for quick UI reads. Shape: { timestamp, cpu_percent, memory_percent, disk_percent, network_latency, uptime, uptime_seconds }. Full heartbeat data is in wire/heartbeat.json.

granted_intents.description: Granted AWS/cloud intent permissions. Always an array, empty when no intents are granted. Items are GrantedIntent objects with TTL.

history_trail.description: Chronological log of operator lifecycle events managed by VSOD.

event_type.description: Event type. Values: created, slot.created, bound, unbound, heartbeat.received, status.changed, api.key.refreshed, created.from.refresh, reset, terminated

actor.description: Component or entity that caused this event. Values: vsod, user, g8eo, system

operator_status_info._description: Lightweight projection of OperatorDocument returned by GET /api/operators/status and GET /api/internal/operators/:id/status. g8ee's OperatorDocument model maps to this shape.

is_active.description: True when status == active. Computed field, never stored.

granted_intents.description: Active intent names (string projection of GrantedIntent objects). Always an array, empty when no intents are granted.

current_hostname.description: Denormalized hostname from system_info for quick access without traversing nested objects

session_token.description: Active session token for session-based auth validation. Set by VSOD at bootstrap time.

session_expires_at.description: WebSession expiration timestamp. Null means no session expiry is enforced.
